title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Developing a **full stack B2B SaaS application** that enables clients to validate eligibility strategy changes through automated test execution. Built with **React**, **AWS API Gateway**, and **Python Lambda** functions.

Led Migration of **20+** client APIs from **APIGEE** proxies to **AWS API Gateway** and **AWS Lambda (Golang)**, improving maintainability, reducing infrastructure costs, and lowering end-to-end API latency by **25%** .

title: Associate Software Engineer
description: Built **backend services** and cloud infrastructure for “**Instant Unlock**,” a B2B solution that enables consumers to temporarily unlock frozen credit profiles directly within client platforms using **KBA/OTP** based authentication workflows. Developed APIs using **Spring Boot**, background processing using **Spring Batch**.

Built an internal **AI-powered** chat application for engineering teams using **RAG** and **MCP**, with integrations into enterprise tooling to support knowledge retrieval, automated workflows, and efficient troubleshooting.

Led the **zero-downtime DB migration** of backend application handling **150k+** monthly transactions from a single-region deployment to a **global database architecture**, ensuring high availability and seamless cutover.

Built and managed **cloud infrastructure** using **Terraform** and implemented disaster recovery infrastructure for multiple existing microservices through cross-region resource replication to us-west-2.

title: Software Engineer Intern
description: Developed and maintained **20+ RESTful APIs** using **Spring Boot**, production releases, and major JDK version upgrades while addressing security vulnerabilities and improving application stability.
Built **CI/CD** pipelines for multiple **AWS ECS** microservices using **Jenkins**, integrating SonarQube, Veracode, Checkmarx, and Wiz for automated quality, security, and vulnerability validation.
Created observability dashboards using **Splunk** and **Dynatrace** to monitor application health, logs, performance metrics, and production incidents in real time.

title: Junior Developer
description: Developed **React (JavaScript)** web application for KMIT, NGIT, and KMEC institutions, including modules for attendance, exam results, live classroom video streaming.
